# stripe_tax_registration (Resource)

A Tax `Registration` lets us know that your business is registered to collect tax on payments within a region, enabling you to [automatically collect tax](https://docs.stripe.com/tax).

Stripe doesn't register on your behalf with the relevant authorities when you create a Tax `Registration` object. For more information on how to register to collect tax, see [our guide](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/registering).

Related guide: [Using the Registrations API](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/registrations-api)



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `active_from` (Number) Time at which the registration becomes active. Measured in seconds since the Unix epoch.
- `country` (String) Two-letter country code ([ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2)).
- `country_options` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--country_options))

### Optional

- `expires_at` (Number) If set, the registration stops being active at this time. If not set, the registration will be active indefinitely. Measured in seconds since the Unix epoch.

### Read-Only

- `created` (Number) Time at which the object was created. Measured in seconds since the Unix epoch.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the object.
- `livemode` (Boolean) If the object exists in live mode, the value is `true`. If the object exists in test mode, the value is `false`.
- `object` (String) String representing the object's type. Objects of the same type share the same value.
- `status` (String) The status of the registration. This field is present for convenience and can be deduced from `active_from` and `expires_at`.

<a id="nestedatt--country_options--us"></a>
### Nested Schema for `country_options.us`

Required:

- `state` (String) Two-letter US state code ([ISO 3166-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-2)).
- `type` (String) Type of registration in the US.

Optional:

- `local_amusement_tax` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--country_options--us--local_amusement_tax))
- `local_lease_tax` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--country_options--us--local_lease_tax))
- `state_sales_tax` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--country_options--us--state_sales_tax))

<a id="nestedatt--country_options--us--local_amusement_tax"></a>
### Nested Schema for `country_options.us.local_amusement_tax`

Required:

- `jurisdiction` (String) A [FIPS code](https://www.census.gov/library/reference/code-lists/ansi.html) representing the local jurisdiction.


<a id="nestedatt--country_options--us--local_lease_tax"></a>
### Nested Schema for `country_options.us.local_lease_tax`

Required:

- `jurisdiction` (String) A [FIPS code](https://www.census.gov/library/reference/code-lists/ansi.html) representing the local jurisdiction.


<a id="nestedatt--country_options--us--state_sales_tax"></a>
### Nested Schema for `country_options.us.state_sales_tax`

Required:

- `elections` (Attributes List) Elections for the state sales tax registration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--country_options--us--state_sales_tax--elections))

<a id="nestedatt--country_options--us--state_sales_tax--elections"></a>
### Nested Schema for `country_options.us.state_sales_tax.elections`

Required:

- `type` (String) The type of the election for the state sales tax registration.

Optional:

- `jurisdiction` (String) A [FIPS code](https://www.census.gov/library/reference/code-lists/ansi.html) representing the local jurisdiction.




<a id="nestedatt--country_options--uy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `country_options.uy`

Required:

- `type` (String) Type of registration in `country`.

Optional:

- `standard` (Attributes) Options for the standard registration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--country_options--uy--standard))

<a id="nestedatt--country_options--uy--standard"></a>
### Nested Schema for `country_options.uy.standard`

Optional:
